name: Clearbit API
what_it_does: B2B data enrichment platform API that provides company and person intelligence from email addresses or domain names, used for lead enrichment and qualification.
use_cases: Enriching lead records with company data in CRM automation agents
Qualifying leads by company size, industry, and technology stack
Identifying website visitors via IP-to-company matching
Building firmographic data for sales outreach targeting
Deduplicating and normalizing company data in pipelines
not_for: Teams outside North America/Europe (data coverage varies)
best_when: Your agent needs to enrich B2B leads with company firmographics, technographics, and contact data to qualify or route them.
avoid_when: You need consumer data, non-North American/European company data, or are on a tight budget.

auth.notes: API key via HTTP Basic Auth (key as username, empty password). Simple but credential must be protected.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pricing not publicly listed; typically $99/mo for small plans, enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Now owned by HubSpot (acquired 2023). Pricing has changed. Some features bundled into HubSpot. Primarily enterprise-focused now.

performance.rate_limits: 600 requests/minute; streaming webhooks for async enrichment

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON errors with type and message fields. 202 responses for async enrichment require webhook handling.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Enrichment lookups are read-only and naturally idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Acquired by HubSpot in 2023 - API still works but future direction uncertain
Returns 202 for async enrichment when data isn't cached - agents need webhook to receive results
Data freshness varies - some company records may be months old
GDPR compliance requires careful handling of European person data enrichment
Not all email addresses map to enrichment results - agents must handle empty/null responses

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B data enrichment API (now HubSpot Data Enrichment). API key auth. Contains PII (company + contact data) — GDPR/CCPA compliance required. Webhook secrets for real-time events.
